actions: No code changes were required after review approval.
Review approval and remaining risks were recorded in review-response.md.
remaining_risks: No live Feishu tenant, real WSClient long connection, or real OpenCode service end-to-end run was performed.
Windows and WSL terminal escaping was verified by command construction tests, not by manual coverage of every special-character combination in an interactive terminal.
Future OpenCode SSE schema changes may require adapting the current strict session filtering.
summary: 完成审查反馈处理：review-gate 已批准，未提供阻断项、必修项、建议项或讨论项；生成 review-response.md 记录审查通过和无需代码变更。
